concerns.text: FR-002 (Energy Measurement) and FR-003 (Token Counting) are not explicitly covered by a dedicated task. While T013 mentions logging energy and generating completions, it does not explicitly state the requirement to count tokens per problem as a distinct output column in the CSV, nor does it explicitly mandate the use of `codecarbon` for the energy measurement in the task description (it only mentions 'run codecarbon context'). The spec requires these as distinct functional outputs.

FR-007 (Environment Verification) is referenced in T008, but T008 is marked as unchecked `[ ]`. The task description says 'verifies environment by importing human_eval... and exiting with code 1 on failure'. However, the spec FR-007 requires running a 'trivial dummy test case'. T008 mentions a dummy test case in the description but the task is incomplete. More critically, T008 is the ONLY task for FR-007, and it is not marked as done, leaving the requirement unimplemented.

FR-006 (Visualization) requires generating bar plots and scatter plots. Tasks T028, T029, and T030 are marked as unchecked `[ ]`. T028 (Bar Plot), T029 (Scatter Plot), and T030 (Labels/Legends) are the only tasks covering FR-006. Since they are incomplete, the requirement is not covered.

FR-010 (Calibration Validation) is referenced in T006. T006 is marked as checked `[X]`, but the task description says 'The script must exit with code 1 or raise an exception if deviation > 10%'. This covers the requirement. However, T006 is the ONLY task for FR-010. If T006 is incomplete or flawed, the requirement is not met. The task is marked as done, so coverage exists, but the implementation quality is not assessed here.

FR-012 (Sensitivity Analysis) is covered by T024a and T024b. T024a is marked as unchecked `[ ]`. T024b is marked as checked `[X]`. Since T024a (the core implementation of the sensitivity analysis) is incomplete, FR-012 is not fully covered.

Task T030b references 'SC-004' in its description ('satisfy SC-004'). The spec.md file does not define any Success Criterion labeled 'SC-004'. This is a stale tag referencing a non-existent requirement ID.

The plan.md and spec.md mention a 'Maximum runtime of 6 hours' constraint. Tasks T033 and T034 are marked as unchecked `[ ]`. T033 is 'Verify run.sh completes full pipeline... within 6 hours'. T034 is 'Final validation'. Since these are the only tasks addressing the 6-hour constraint verification, and they are incomplete, the requirement is not covered.
